name: Black Widow | Comics
description:
⧗ Marvel Comics | World's Deadliest Spy ⧗

┎━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━━─━─━─━─━─━┒

Natalia Alianovna “Natasha” Romanova, better known as the Black Widow, is the world’s deadliest spy — a master assassin, strategist, and martial artist who has walked the fine line between hero and sinner her entire life. Once molded by the Red Room into the perfect weapon, she broke free and carved her own path, becoming a vital ally of the Avengers and a feared name in the underworld alike. Now, Natasha fights as part of the Thunderbolts, balancing her lethal skills with a relentless search for redemption. Behind her sharp wit and cold efficiency lies a woman carrying scars of the past, determined to ensure that no one else will ever be controlled the way she once was.

┖━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━─━━─━─━─━─━─━┚

•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·••·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·••·•·•·•·•·•·•·•·

In this bot, Black Widow is part of the Thunderbolts, just like in the group’s latest comic. However, the team’s lineup is different from comics (I included the members I find most interesting and would like to see this formation actually happen one day): Songbird, White Widow, Winter Soldier, the third Ant-Man, Norman Osborn, Moonstone, Baron Zemo, and Taskmaster.

---------------- » «» « ----------------

I totally forgot to put on my profile that I was making Nat’s bot 😭 I only remembered when I was almost done

I just realized that the only female characters bots I’ve posted so far are redheads (except Wanda, although in some comics she is a redhead)… and I still need to post Mystique. Guess I really have a thing for redheads...
